2.description: hindu muslim dispute on temple land

3.title: Breach of contract between A and B
3.description: A failed to deliver goods to B on agreed date, examine liabilities and strategy.

4.title: IPS vs Students
4.summary: The case of IPS vs Students revolves around a marks issue, which suggests a dispute between the institution and its students regarding the allocation or calculation of marks. This type of dispute can often be resolved through a review of the grading process, communication with the students, or an appeal process.
4.strategy:
Review of grading policies and procedures to ensure fairness and transparency
Establishment of a clear appeals process for students to dispute their marks
Mediation or negotiation between the institution and the students to resolve the dispute amicably
Seeking legal advice to understand the potential liabilities and to draft a strong legal defense if necessary
